title: cyphomandra allophylla
intro: Cyphomandra allophylla, also known as the Tamarillo or Tree Tomato, is a species of flowering plant in the nightshade family, Solanaceae. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Cyphomandra allophylla include antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease and certain cancers. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and fruits can be used to make teas, tinctures, and jams, which are often used to treat digestive issues and boost the immune system.
